{{Infobox character
| name = Ansher
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Ansher]] is a man with iron-gray hair who reports to [[Erastes]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Ansher]] is a man who gives orders to foot soldiers in the camp.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Ansher]] was a mounted soldier who prepared an arrow.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Ansher]] fires arrows at [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“Captain Erastes, sir,” said the old man on the horse. “Ansher,” Erastes responded.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
